title: Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Missions2.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Missions 2:
Escape from Thyferra'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[October]] [[1997]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=74 |isbn=0590127942 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]''[[Star Wars Missions 1: Assault on Yavin Four]]'' and the next three ''Star Wars Missions'' books tell a continuous story that starts the day after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but before the start of the [[Yavin blockade]] proper, placing them in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series=''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Missions 1: Assault on Yavin Four]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin]]'' }} {{Quote|But General, it's our only lead! Thyferra may prove to be a dead end, but we have to try! I will ''not'' lose ''another'' planet to the Empire!|Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|''[[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra]]''}} '''''Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra''''' is the second adventure book in the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]]. It was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[October]] [[1997]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The Rebel forces have found an Imperial conspiracy involving contaminated bacta, a deadly substance that can poison entire planets. In order to stop the Empire, the Rebels travel to Thyferra…where they are trapped by a squadron of stormtroopers! Your mission: to escape from Thyferra…before it's too late.'' ''May the Force be with you.'' ==Plot summary== *Mission Type: Rebel As the [[Liquidator (Imperial II-class)|''Liquidator'']] lies in wait over [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]] for the arrival of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], Admiral [[Termo]] views a holotape recorded by Grand Moff [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] several weeks prior. Tarkin's holorecording tells Termo to send a coded transmission to [[Palpatine/Legends|B90-478R]], and to await further instructions. Meanwhile, on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] explain to General [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] about the contaminated bacta that the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] had been carrying. Alarmed, Dodonna decides to dispatch a team to [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] to investigate. Organa volunteers, and she and her entourage board the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and set course for Thyferra. On the way, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] repairs the ancient droid, [[Q-7N]]. On the ''Liquidator'', Termo contacts B90-478R, only to learn that he is, in fact, speaking with Galactic Emperor Palpatine. Palpatine informs him that Tarkin is dead, and the Death Star was destroyed. The ''Falcon'' enters the [[Polith system]] safely, with a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] brought in tow as a backup. However, upon landing on Thyferra, all of the Rebels are captured. But [[Q-7N]] and one of the Rebels escape, with a view to helping the others. They commandeer the Y-wing and land it a few blocks from the Imperial garrison. The Rebel tries to find [[Voralla Morbo]], a local who is sympathetic to the Rebellion. However, on the way, they are tricked by a Kubaz, and almost robbed. The Rebel fights their way out of the situation, saves a [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] named [[Plurra]] from slavery and returns to the other Rebels. The group meet with Morbo, and she tells them that a modified Imperial Carrack cruiser picked up a large amount of [[Alazhi/Legends|''alazhi'']] several weeks ago, and shipped it to [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]]. Picking up on the lead, Organa, Solo and Skywalker prepare to set course for Delrakkin. ==Release and reception== *''Escape from Thyferra'': {{ISBN|0-590-12794-2}} *Star Wars Kids: The Magazine for Young Jedi Knights 2: {{ISBN|0-590-12789-6}} *Mission Team Cards (Set 2): {{ISBN|0-590-12799-3}} **[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] **[[C-3PO/Legends|See-Threepio]] **[[Wedge
